title: Far From Home
story: The campfire, a beacon of earthly memories, flickers under the watchful eyes of alien constellations. The lone voyager sketches the strange skyline, hoping to bring a piece of this world back home.

details.label: Completed Size
details.info: 4.0 x 4.0 inches or 10.2 x 10.2 cm on 14 count aida
